```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement cost monitoring and optimization for cloud resources"
---
# Cloud Cost Optimization
## Task
Monitor and optimize cloud resource costs.
## Requirements
1. Tag all resources for cost attribution. 2. Monitor spending by service/team.
3. Identify and eliminate waste (unused resources). 4. Implement auto-scaling to match demand.
5. Set budget alerts and anomaly detection.
## Constraints
- Tag all resources. Review costs weekly. Alert on > 20% budget deviation.
## Success Criteria
- Costs attributed by team. Waste eliminated. Scaling matches demand. Alerts configured.
```
